key.name: alias
key.description: Name advertised to other LocalSend devices.

key.name: fingerprint
key.description: Random identifier used to avoid self-discovery.

key.name: port
key.description: HTTP and multicast port used by the LocalSend service.

key.name: download-folder
key.description: Directory used to store accepted incoming files.

key.name: auto-accept
key.description: Accept transfer requests without asking first.

key.name: auto-disable-enabled
key.description: Automatically turn LocalSend off after it has been enabled for a while.

key.name: auto-disable-minutes
key.description: Number of minutes before LocalSend is turned off automatically.
